tasks.title: Build workflow: Manual Trigger + "deny test" Set node
tasks.spec:
Outcome: A simple workflow with a Manual Trigger connected to a single Set node named "deny test".

Trigger mode: Manual — use the n8n Manual Trigger node (n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger). No schedule, no webhook.

External systems: None.

Required effects: The Set node named exactly "deny test" receives the trigger output. No further downstream nodes are needed.

Required branches: None — single linear path.

Required data: No specific fields required. The Set node can have no fields configured (empty set) since no downstream consumer needs specific data.

Explicit constraints:
- The Set node must be named exactly "deny test".
- No additional nodes beyond the Manual Trigger and the "deny test" Set node.

Empty/invalid behavior: N/A — manual trigger always produces a single item with no input data.

Done when: The workflow saves successfully, contains exactly two nodes (Manual Trigger → "deny test" Set node), and passes validation.

planningContext.summary: Build a minimal workflow with a Manual Trigger and a Set node named "deny test", then run it.
assumptions: The Set node will have no fields configured since no downstream data is required.
The workflow will be created in the personal project.

suspendPayload.message: Review the plan (1 task) before execution starts.
